channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download Yamicsoft Windows 11/10 Manager 2.3.4

Features of Windows 11 Manager: Information: Creates the system restore point manually; Gets detailed information about your...

item.title: Download UPDF 2.2.0
item.description: UPDF for Windows is easy-to-use PDF software for Windows! Enjoy powerful editing tools for text, images, links, and more in your PDFs. Customize backgrounds, watermarks, and page sizes as easily as in Word. AI-powered PDF editor and manager that offers a wide range of features including editing, annotating, converting, OCR (Optical Character Recognition), organizing, protecting, sharing, printing, summarizing, translating, and interpreting PDF files. item.title: Download Aperty 1.6.0 (1544)
item.description: Aperty is a dedicated portrait editing software developed by Skylum, designed to simplify the editing process for professional photographers. It offers a wide range of features to enhance portrait photography while reducing post-processing time. Why Aperty? Aperty is a photo editing tool for professional portrait photographers who want to reduce post-processing time without sacrificing quality and client satisfaction. item.title: Download Q-Dir 12.51

item.title: Download Bulk Crap Uninstaller - BCUninstaller 6.1 + Portable
item.description: BCUninstaller (Bulk Crap Uninstaller) is a software uninstallation utility, designed to ease the process of uninstalling a large number of programs with minimal effort. When you first run the application, it will show you a list of all installed programs and you have the option to select multiple uninstall candidates through checkboxes. BCUninstaller will then launch each uninstallation process, one after the other, and all you have to do is click the confirmation buttons for each...

item.title: Download Mypal 78.0.1
item.description: Mypal is a web browser Windows XP current and to be maintained. Mypal is based on the code of Pale Moon by Moonchild Productions, it is separated from the code of Mozilla's FireFox a few years ago, but is well maintained and preserved. The goal of Mypal is to provide a web browser current, safe and reliable for Windows XP. Mypal operation identical to Pale Moon with some small exceptions. Introduced system new mobile and a number of certain settings, including code Mozilla old not used,...

item.title: Download TweakNow WinSecret Plus for Windows 11 8.5.1
item.description: TweakNow WinSecret Plus for Windows 11 is a program that allows users to discover hidden settings in Windows 11. This application is specially designed for Windows 11, groups many registry settings and distribute them from the easy and secure user interface. With TweakNow WinSecret Plus for Windows 11 you can move the Windows taskbar to the top and resize the taskbar by editing the registry value. With any application that modifies the registry, we recommend that you have a backup copy...

item.title: Download SoundVolumeView 2.51
item.description: SoundVolumeView is a simple tool for Windows Vista / 7/8/2008/10, displays general information and current volume levels for all components sound activity on your system and allows you to mute and unmute them instantly. SoundVolumeView also allows you to save audio configuration to a file, containing the current volume level status and mute / unmute of all audio components, as well as the audio devices to default, then upload the same file to restore exactly the same file volume levels and...

item.title: Download AllMapSoft Offline Map Maker 8.373
item.description: AllMapSoft Offline Map Maker is software create, organize, offline map from Google Maps, Yahoo maps, Bing maps and Openstreetmap. You can view offline maps downloaded with map viewer offline. And you can zoom out or zoom in the offline map or export map under the file format .BMP with file world xxx.bpw, and can output files xxx.map for OziExplorer. If you want to make a offline map of your city by yourself, it is very useful for you. Features AllMapSoft Offline Map Maker You can...

item.title: Download VovSoft PDF to Image Converter 1.5
item.description: VovSoft PDF to Image Converter is a lightweight, fast and easy to use application capable of converting PDF to images. This is a simple and effective method to convert PDF documents into image files. You can easily extract image files from PDF files with this software. PDF files can be added to the task list by selecting multiple files using the built-in file browser or by dragging and dropping them via Windows Explorer. Just add PDF files to the list and click "Save Image File" button,...
